3035840.name: Bearnard Soundtrack
3035840.description:
The soundtrack of "Bearnard" enriches the game with enchanting melodies that complement its adventurous atmosphere. Each track is thoughtfully composed to enhance the player's immersion in Bearnard's journey through varied landscapes and challenging puzzles, while incorporating charming details reminiscent of the 8-bit era, evoking a sense of nostalgia for classic gaming.

The package contains music from all biomes, main menu music, credits music and 8 bonus combat tracks.
